examples: BTW, the machine is simply amazing.
Jennifer just turned the big 4-0 the other day, BTW.
Avoid ambiguity and context. And that, BTW, has absolutely.
BTW, just checking via Forbes.com that Mr. Lucier was paid 33 million last year.
BTW, A good juicy source of info in the biotech world is Biofind Rumor Mill.
